context.projectOverview: Sprint 24 — Tier 3 integration capstone. Top-level /bober-incident slash command + bober incident start/status/end/list/abort CLI + state machine in src/incident/orchestrator.ts that routes between diagnoser/deployer/postmortemer based on phase. End-to-end integration test with mocked externals.

completedSprints.title: Incident timeline
completedSprints.summary: createIncident, append helpers, setIncidentStatus, listIncidents — all here.

completedSprints.title: Deployer + gates
completedSprints.summary: executeAction with risky-action gate, classifyCommand, resolveRiskyActionMechanism.

completedSprints.title: verifyResolution
completedSprints.summary: setIncidentStatus opts {verifyResult, overrideToken} gate for resolved transition.

completedSprints.title: Postmortemer
completedSprints.summary: generatePostmortem, auto-trigger on resolved, CLI generate/show.
